content.text: 使浏览器进入全屏模式（注意：MAC/iOS 下的 Safari 不支持非交互全屏）。Makes the browser enter full screen mode (Note: Safari on Mac/iOS does not support non-interactive fullscreen)
进入全屏的 Promise，不支持时 reject。Promise that resolves when entering fullscreen, rejects if not supported

```ts
enterFullscreen(); // 默认使 document.body 全屏
```

summary.text: 进入全屏的元素，默认为 document.body。Element to make fullscreen, defaults to document.body

text.comment: 进入全屏的元素，默认为 document.body。Element to make fullscreen, defaults to document.body

Function:

enterFullscreen

Description:

使浏览器进入全屏模式（注意：MAC/iOS 下的 Safari 不支持非交互全屏）。Makes the browser enter full screen mode (Note: Safari on Mac/iOS does not support non-interactive fullscreen)

Returns:

进入全屏的 Promise，不支持时 reject。Promise that resolves when entering fullscreen, rejects if not supported

Example:
enterFullscreen(); // 默认使 document.body 全屏
Example:
const video = document.querySelector('video');
enterFullscreen(video).catch(err => console.error('Fullscreen failed:', err));
